---
title: 'Lesson Plan: Acquiring a Business Using SBA 7(a) Loans - Overview'
date: '2024-06-09T02:27:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Topos Creative, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6576879897260912217'
blogger_filename: '/2024/06/lesson-plan-acquiring-business-using.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Creative, LLC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'SBA'
---

<div><i>ChatGPT-4o Prompt: After a multipronged conversation with GPT about SBA loans, I asked:&nbsp;Draft up a lesson plan based on this entire conversation on all the things I would need to learn and what places I should go to try to learn them.</i></div><h3>Lesson Plan: Acquiring a Business Using SBA 7(a) Loans</h3><h4>Objective:</h4><p>To understand the process and requirements for acquiring a business using SBA 7(a) loans and to identify the resources needed to successfully navigate this process.</p><hr /><h3>Week 1: Introduction and Preliminary Research</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Understand the basics of SBA 7(a) loans.</li><li>Identify the steps involved in acquiring a business.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Research SBA 7(a) Loans:</strong></p><ul><li>Read articles and guides on the SBA website about the 7(a) loan program.</li><li>Watch educational videos on YouTube about SBA loans.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Familiarize with the Business Acquisition Process:</strong></p><ul><li>Review resources on SCORE.org about buying a business.</li><li>Read case studies of successful business acquisitions.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>SBA.gov</li><li>SCORE.org</li><li>YouTube (search for SBA 7(a) loan tutorials)</li></ul><hr /><h3>Week 2: Identifying Potential Businesses and Financial Viability</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Learn how to identify businesses for sale.</li><li>Understand financial statements and business valuation.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Identifying Businesses:</strong></p><ul><li>Explore online marketplaces like BizBuySell to find businesses for sale.</li><li>Network with local business owners and attend business networking events.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Financial Analysis:</strong></p><ul><li>Take online courses or read guides on understanding financial statements.</li><li>Learn the basics of business valuation from resources like Investopedia.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>BizBuySell.com</li><li>Local business networking events</li><li>Online courses (Coursera, Udemy)</li></ul><hr /><h3>Week 3: Creating a Business Plan</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Understand the components of a business plan.</li><li>Develop a draft business plan for acquiring a business.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Business Plan Creation:</strong></p><ul><li>Use SCORE’s business plan templates and guides.</li><li>Attend a SCORE workshop or webinar on business planning.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Drafting Your Plan:</strong></p><ul><li>Write a draft business plan, focusing on your strategy for running and growing the business you plan to acquire.</li><li>Seek feedback from a SCORE mentor.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>SCORE.org (business plan templates and workshops)</li><li>Local SCORE chapter for mentoring</li></ul><hr /><h3>Week 4: Securing Financing</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Learn how to approach lenders and secure SBA 7(a) loan financing.</li><li>Understand the documentation required for loan applications.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Approaching Lenders:</strong></p><ul><li>Identify local banks and credit unions that offer SBA 7(a) loans.</li><li>Learn how to present your business plan and financials to lenders.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Loan Documentation:</strong></p><ul><li>Gather necessary documentation such as personal financial statements, tax returns, and business financials.</li><li>Attend a webinar or workshop on SBA loan applications.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>Local banks and credit unions</li><li>SBA.gov (loan application guides)</li><li>SCORE workshops</li></ul><hr /><h3>Week 5: Negotiating and Closing the Deal</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Understand the negotiation process for acquiring a business.</li><li>Learn the legal and financial steps to finalize the purchase.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Negotiation Techniques:</strong></p><ul><li>Read books or take online courses on negotiation.</li><li>Role-play negotiation scenarios with a mentor or peer.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Closing the Deal:</strong></p><ul><li>Consult with a business attorney to understand legal requirements.</li><li>Prepare for the closing process by reviewing checklists and guides.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>Books on negotiation (e.g., "Getting to Yes" by Fisher and Ury)</li><li>Online courses (Coursera, Udemy)</li><li>Local business attorney</li></ul><hr /><h3>Week 6: Transition and Management</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Plan for a smooth transition of business ownership.</li><li>Develop management skills for running the acquired business.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Transition Planning:</strong></p><ul><li>Create a transition plan detailing how you will take over operations.</li><li>Communicate with employees, customers, and suppliers about the change in ownership.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Management Skills:</strong></p><ul><li>Take courses on small business management.</li><li>Join local business groups or networks for ongoing support.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>Online courses (Coursera, Udemy)</li><li>Local business groups (Chamber of Commerce)</li></ul><hr /><h3>Ongoing: Mentorship and Continuous Learning</h3><p><strong>Objectives:</strong></p><ul><li>Maintain ongoing support and learning through mentorship.</li><li>Continuously improve business management skills.</li></ul><p><strong>Activities:</strong></p><ol><li><p><strong>Mentorship:</strong></p><ul><li>Regularly meet with a SCORE mentor for advice and support.</li><li>Join a mastermind group or business support group.</li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Continuous Learning:</strong></p><ul><li>Stay updated with the latest business trends and best practices.</li><li>Attend workshops, webinars, and conferences.</li></ul></li></ol><p><strong>Resources:</strong></p><ul><li>SCORE.org (mentorship)</li><li>Local business support groups</li><li>Industry conferences and workshops</li></ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom&nbsp;<span face="sans-serif" style="background-color: white; color: #202122; font-size: 14px;">שָׁלוֹם</span>: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe</span></div>

Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Freelancer
<div><br /></div>
